mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_conversations WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_conversations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = #{isActive} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_conversations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND context = #{context} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_conversations WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_conversations SET message_count = #{messageCount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{conversationId}
